title: T-005 — spare_parts + spare_parts_stock + spare_parts_transactions + mwo_spare_parts DDL + RLS (13-d, MNT §9.8-9.11)
prompt:
# T-005 — Spare parts catalog + stock + transactions

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §9.8, §9.9, §9.10, §9.11, §7.1 (D-MNT-6 separate-catalog), §11.5 (V-MNT-18..20)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 4 spares tables (`spare_parts`, `spare_parts_stock`, `spare_parts_transactions`, `mwo_spare_parts`) with full RLS. Spare parts catalog is SEPARATE from 03-technical `items` table per D-MNT-6 — different RLS scope (maintenance team vs production). Cross-link to 05-warehouse via optional `warehouse_id` only (no LP picker, no FEFO logic per D-MNT-6).

## Pre-flight
Verify latest migration #, `equipment`/`mwo` (T-002/T-004) exist, 05-warehouse `warehouses` table — if absent, `warehouse_id` is plain UUID NULL with no FK.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_d_spares.sql` with the 4 tables per PRD §9.8-9.11 DDL.
2. `spare_parts_transactions.txn_type CHECK IN ('receipt','consume','adjust','transfer_out','transfer_in','return')`.
3. `spare_parts_transactions.id UUID` (UUID v7 idempotency per R14; use `gen_random_uuid()` until app sets v7 — comment).
4. R13 audit cols on all 4 tables.
5. ENABLE+FORCE RLS via `app.current_org_id()` + site_user_access (where site_id present).
6. Indexes per PRD §9.9/9.10: `idx_sp_stock_reorder`, `idx_sp_txn_mwo`, `idx_sp_txn_part_date`.
7. CHECK constraint: `spare_parts_stock.qty_on_hand >= 0`.
8. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/spares.ts`.
9. Vitest: RLS isolation, txn_type CHECK, qty_on_hand non-negative CHECK, partial index `idx_sp_stock_reorder` selectivity.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_d_spares.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/spares.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/maintenance-d-spares.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when the 4 tables are inspected, then column shape per §9.8-9.11 + CHECK on txn_type + CHECK qty_on_hand>=0 + R13 audit cols + RLS+FORCE RLS are present.
2. Given two orgs and `app.set_org_context`, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds and policies reference `app.current_org_id()`.
3. Given INSERT with txn_type='unknown', when executed, then it fails CHECK; same for negative qty_on_hand.
4. Given `EXPLAIN SELECT … FROM spare_parts_stock WHERE qty_on_hand<=reorder_point`, when run, then `idx_sp_stock_reorder` is used.

## Test strategy
- RED: maintenance-d-spares.test.ts asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test maintenance-d-spares`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not couple this table to 03-technical `items` — D-MNT-6 explicitly mandates separate catalog (different RLS, different lifecycle).
- Do not add LP/FEFO logic — explicit boundary per UX line 249-254 + translation notes §spares.jsx.
- Do not add 04-planning/05-warehouse FK CASCADE — soft references only.
- Do not read current_setting() GUC; use app.current_org_id().
- Do not name business column tenant_id.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create spare_parts + spare_parts_stock + spare_parts_transactions + mwo_spare_parts (4 tables) with RLS, txn_type/qty_on_hand CHECK, R13 audit; separate from 03-TECH items per D-MNT-6.
pipeline_inputs.details: Spares cross-link to 05-warehouse via optional warehouse_id (no FEFO). 05-warehouse spares stock dependency is soft (no FK CASCADE); 04-planning PO integration P2.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration runs, when the 4 tables are inspected, then column shape per §9.8-9.11 + CHECK constraints + R13 + RLS+FORCE RLS are present
Given two orgs and app.set_org_context, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds and policies reference app.current_org_id()
Given INSERT with txn_type='unknown' or qty_on_hand=-1, when executed, then it fails CHECK
Given EXPLAIN of reorder query, when run, then idx_sp_stock_reorder is used
test_strategy: Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test maintenance-d-spares`
risk_red_lines: Do not couple spare_parts to 03-technical items (D-MNT-6)
Do not name business column tenant_id; do not read current_setting() GUC
